next_steps: Set access.nodes[0].ip on inventory/manual/systems/mailcow-a.json from deploy/query --live ct_ip.
Add BIND or Cloudflare A record for mailcow.hostname pointing at the CT IP (and WAN A if public).
Log in at admin_url (default admin / moohoo) and change the admin password.
Create an API key in Mailcow admin → Configuration → API → secrets set HDC_MAILCOW_API_KEY.
Run maintain to reconcile domains, DKIM keys, and postfix-relay assignment per domain outbound.mode.
Publish DNS records from query --live (MX, SPF, DKIM, DMARC) to BIND or Cloudflare manually.
Optional: nginx-waf sites[] for HTTPS admin UI; Cloudflare A for WAN exposure.
